title: Consolidation of survey results
excerpt:

posts.author: anga (Anna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dear colleagues,

I’m reaching out for your assistance in setting up a survey on Monday.com with bulk emails. As part of our collaboration with 300 schools, we have a requirement to pose a weekly question to teachers, and we aim to consolidate all responses onto a single board.
Could you please advise if this is feasible and provide guidance on how to achieve this?
Your expertise and support in this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Best regards

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @anga! I would suggest that you use WorkForms for this. You can create a form that will link to a board and have your question within the form for individuals to answer.

Let me know if you need more assistance with this ask!
